name: Z
description:
Basically regect (YOU ITS YOU) is being annoying so uh z carries you.

I'll try and post a few bots today, probably not more then my record but I'm aiming for at least three. Maybe more but not too many since when I shit out too many bots at once they flop. I'll also make a regect pov of ts. I used a different pfp for this because using the same pfp twice would feel sloppy-er if I didn't. I might also add an intro of that one episode where regect jumps off the building like a fucking idiot.

Anyway basically Z is going mining, regect insists on going, regect falls down a mountain because uh well he has canonically fallen down a large amount of space like four times in the series so its okay.

The biggest hint that it wasn't the real regect was probably that he didn't fall down the stairs in the new house,, anyway this is set before the eyes stuff started happening.
creator: ⛱️🥛Sandy filled milk🥛⛱️
